title: Italian-Style Noodle Soup
description: A hearty and comforting Italian-inspired noodle soup made with fish and fresh flavors. Serve hot and enjoy!
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté for 3-4 minutes until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the bouncy fish fillets and cook until opaque and flaky.
Add the dried oregano, dried basil, salt, and black pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Add the canadians noodles to the pot and stir to combine with the fish and spices.
Pour in 4 cups of water and bring the soup to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes or until the noodles are cooked through.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or basil if desired.
